text: Being here, I feel an eerie sense of isolation. The dim lighting and sharp angles cultivate an atmosphere of ambiguity and abandonment. It seems like a space designed for human activity and purpose, yet presently devoid of presence and sound. The silence amplifies my awareness of myself and my surroundings. I feel almost as though I am intruding on a moment meant for introspection or waiting for something unforeseen to emerge from the shadows.
